notes: Placeholder path -- never commit audio or real local paths. stdlib backends need 16-bit PCM WAV (convert MP3s first); the optional librosa backend decodes whatever librosa can load.
No accepted_bpms given, so the evaluator accepts all three octave interpretations of expected_bpm: 170 (direct), 85 (half_time), 340 (double_time). Half-time is a valid mashup pulse here, not a miss.
Direct-only fixture: a bare click track where a half/double-time reading should count as a failure. Generate your own click WAVs locally; do not commit them.
Expected hard case for the stdlib envelope backends (weak transients). Wider tolerance on purpose.
